title: Clues in 'Majestic-12' UFO files the FBI claimed were fake prove secret alien unit was real, researcher claims
description: A new investigation into an infamous UFO conspiracy claims to have uncovered proof that top-secret documents labels as fakes are actually real.

title: Why desert drives and UFO lore haunt Phoenix rocker’s new album
description: Phoenix rocker shares the story behind "Jason P. Woodbury & The Night Bird Singing Quartet," from childhood memories of desert drives to UFOs.

title: Exorcist Priest Warns 'Aliens Are Just Demons' Claiming UFO Abductions Are Secretly Diabolical Attacks On Humans
description: A Catholic exorcist priest claims aliens are actually demons, arguing UFO abductions mirror diabolical attacks described in Christian theology.

title: When can I watch 'The Man Who Saw Them Arrive'? Streaming details for UFO doc across the world
description: An encounter in 1968 changed one man's life. Here's how to watch "The Man Who Saw Them Arrive" online from anywhere.

title: Editorial cartoon: UFO files
description: President Donald Trump's attack on elections makes it seem like aliens from outer space were interfering.
